# name: # The last two are technically optional but recommended
# Layer is anything. Stripes on the same layer will draw over each other

end: 3/3. These mean a stripe of 1/3 height

org: a default value of '0' is used
start: i.e. all rows without a layer will be drawn on a single one

org: which draws vertical lines. In that case
end: end and band are not used
band: and the name is a label for that line
